style_effects: Constant static sparks flicker and dance around Koffing's body, glowing with vibrant electric blue and white hues that trail behind it like crackling energy. A pulsing electromagnetic aura radiates in sharp, jagged waves of neon cyan, intensifying with each movement, while its eyes and tail emit a bright, rhythmic pulse of electric yellow. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
